metadata.notes: All values calculated at stage 0. Speed scales with stage progression for most enemies (except static enemies). Damage scales linearly: base + stage * multiplier.

enemies.behavior_notes: Fast basic attacker with no special mechanics. Forms squads in various formations. Predictable movement patterns. Low threat individually but dangerous in groups.
SELF-DESTRUCT MECHANIC: Descends until near player, then enters 'aim' state with warning sign and targeting line. Represents extreme suicide threat. One collision = heavy damage from detonation.
Mobile ranged attacker. Positions from distance, shoots repeatedly. Dodges and evades. Slow vertical movement but delivers sustained ranged damage. Spawns with escorts (Pioneers). Multi-hit threat.

Support/utility enemy - HEALS ALLIES via animated lightning beams. Reduces overall threat to player by keeping enemies alive. Meteor transformation on death. Moderate independent threat but enhances squad survivability.
Greed mechanic: steals exp when collecting orbs, changes core color based on stolen exp. Grows stronger with stolen resources. Average combat stats but exp denial is secondary threat.
FASTEST regular enemy. Shoots elongated bullets repeatedly (shootTimer: 36-60 frames). High mobility combined with ranged attack. Spawns in pairs/trios. Rapid fire DPS threat.
LASER WEAPON enemy. Very high collision damage (20 base). Enters 'warn' then 'laser' states. Powerful beam attack. Moderate speed offset by high damage output. Significant sustained damage threat.
STATIC TANK with 4 shield orbs. High HP (60 base). Doesn't attack player directly - purely defensive. Blocks projectiles and space. Threat is positional (blocking lanes) not combat damage.
SHIELD TANK with reflection mechanic. Slow horizontal approach (3.2 px/frame sideways). Forms tight blocking lines. High HP (64 base). Defensive support - low direct threat, medium positional threat.
Boss with 6 rotating wing weapons and energy crystal attacks. Multiple weapon patterns. Can spawn projectiles in radial bursts. Stationary but devastating output. 2000+ HP base.
Boss with 5 turrets that fire independently. Multi-phase combat. Spawns Kamikaze units from turrets. Can stun turrets but adds complexity. 2000+ HP base. Turret-based DPS threat.

Boss with dual attack systems: radial bullet spray AND homing missiles. Missiles with 180-240 frame lifetimes. Advanced targeting. 1600+ HP base. Combines pattern variety with homing mechanic - highest complexity threat.
Boss variant (Trump-themed). Stationary. Boss-class collision damage (24 base). 2000+ HP range. Multi-phase combat patterns. Extreme threat tier.
Boss variant (Vietnamese-themed). Stationary. Boss-class collision damage (24 base). 1800+ HP range. Multi-phase patterns. Extreme threat tier.

mechanics_summary.speed_scaling: Most enemies: vy = base + (current_stage * 0.06-0.1), Kamikaze: vy = 1.2 + rand(0.6) + stage * 0.08

special_mechanics.thuatsi: Heals allied enemies via laser beam
special_mechanics.cnox_greedy: Steals exp orbs, grows in power
special_mechanics.bosses: Multi-phase, high HP, complex attack patterns

threat_factors.defensive: CnoxShield, ThuHo - positional threat vs combat threat
